query:
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, supplierName, discoveryNotes, customerExternalId, customerName
FROM services
WHERE monthlyCost = 49.00 AND discoveryNotes LIKE '%COST REVIEW NEEDED%'
ORDER BY customerExternalId;
